channel.title: a part of MµLearning
channel.description: Last 10 notes on a part of MµLearning

item.title: 01-00-Latex summary
item.description: well, this won’t be a comprehensive thing , it is just a small intro to get started more like syntax oriented , good to know for proper debugging [! a small note] it is written tex and latex but it is pronounced “tec”/“latec” or with a “k” or whatever Some theory maybe? worth it Key Concepts and Eco...

item.title: 01-01-Ecosystem
item.description: An overview of the ecosystem, terminology, and fundamental ideas.

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Auxiliary Tools for an engineer Welcome to Auxiliary Tools for an engineer, your central hub for all supporting utilities, workflows, and productivity boosters.

item.title: 01-02-Latex for Writing
item.description: If you’re a student , I am assuming that you’re using latex to write your reports so in this page we going to guide you to effectively manipulate and write in latex smoothly to quickly start your documenting journey This is more of a conceptual cheatsheet : where we introduce a concept in LaTex and ...

item.title: index
item.description: AuxiliaryTools Vault Card Domain: Tooling Version: v.1* Status: published Supporting tools and workflows vault for engineering productivity, currently featuring LaTeX for professional document preparation with planned expansion to version control and other utility guides.
